raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "pytidylib" %}
{% set version = "0.3.2" %}


package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/pytidylib-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 22b1c8d75970d8064ff999c2369e98af1d0685417eda4c829a5c9f56764b0af3

build:
  number: 1
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - tidy-html5

test:
  imports:
    - tidylib
  commands:
    - pip check
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: http://countergram.com/open-source/pytidylib/
  summary: Python wrapper for HTML Tidy (tidylib) on Python 2 and 3
  doc_url: https://pythonhosted.org/pytidylib/
  dev_url: https://github.com/countergram/pytidylib
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - thewchan
